description: View and manage available AI models

keyDialog.createGroupHint: Select a group. Only groups that support this model are listed.
keyDialog.createGroupRequired: Select a group to create the key.
keyDialog.createNotSupported: Key creation is not available for this account.

ineligible.missingAuth: This account does not have authentication configured.
ineligible.missingCredentials: This account is missing required credentials.

keyDialog.noCompatibleDescription: Create a key for this model, or adjust existing key model limits.
keyDialog.noCompatibleFoundAfterCreate: Key created, but no compatible key was found for {{modelId}}.
keyDialog.selectHint: Select which key you want to use for this model.
keyDialog.subtitle: Account: {{accountName}} · Model: {{modelId}}
keyDialog.title: Key for model

pleaseSelectFirst: Please select an account or API credential profile first to view model list
pricingDescription: Price information comes from the API interface provided by the site, and the actual cost is subject to the prices published by each site. The price of pay-per-use models is the cost per 1M tokens, and pay-per-call models display the cost per call

profileSourceNotice.description: Stored API credential profiles only provide model discovery and verification. Pricing, group filters, account summaries, and key compatibility are unavailable for this source.
profileSourceNotice.title: Profile-backed model catalog

status.formatNotStandard: The model data format of the current site does not meet the standard, please manually check the site pricing page
status.goToSitePricing: Go to site to view pricing information
status.incompatibleDesc: The model data interface of the current site does not conform to the standard specification, possibly due to secondary development of the site. The extension cannot parse the model pricing information of this site for the time being
status.loadFailed: Failed to load model data, please try again later
status.profileLoadFailed: Failed to load models for this API credential profile: {{errorMessage}}
status.profileLoadFailedTitle: Failed to load models for this API credential profile

title: Model List
